name: create_formatted_word_document_from_json
desc: Create a formatted Word document (.docx) from structured JSON.

parameters.name: content_json
parameters.description: JSON object with report structure: { title, subtitle?, author?, sections: [{ heading, level?, paragraphs?, table?: { headers, rows }, list?: [] }] }

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Output .docx file path. If omitted, writes to .mepbridge/qa/exports/

parameters.name: convert_to_pdf
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to also convert the document to PDF after creation
